name: Northern Corridor Crisis
overview: A fictional regional crisis is unfolding around a contested maritime corridor. Ambiguous cyber activity, disinformation, and shadow-fleet behaviour are challenging coalition freedom of movement.
initial_blue_situation: Blue naval forces are protecting territorial waters and a commercial transit corridor while national authorities assess attribution for spoofing and cyber disruption.
seed_events: AIS anomalies reported near a chokepoint.
A contractor-managed logistics platform shows intermittent latency.
Manipulated social media clips question Blue rules of engagement.
facilitator_notes: Start with ambiguity. Force Blue to prioritise attribution, maritime security, and public messaging before escalating.
